source.title: How To Setup and Defend Villa ALL SITES - Rainbow Six Siege
source.notes: Creator (Littleton) walks all four Villa bombsites for Defense only — no matching Attack transcript is available for this map, so this file is Defense-only. Auto-generated captions are frequently garbled on operator names and jargon (e.g. 'mro cam' = Maestro's Evil Eye camera, 'zombie/bike storage/Tetris/China/pig or wolf' are the creator's own informal room nicknames, not official callouts). Two spots in the transcript name an operator as sounding like 'leion'/'legion' recommending 'goo mines' for intel around the North/Aviator side and again near Living Room's Mud Room window — 'Legion' is not a real R6 Siege operator (it doesn't exist), and this is a known recurring ASR mishearing of Lesion, who is Defense-side and whose signature gadget is literally Gu (goo) mines, so this has been resolved to Lesion rather than left unconfirmed (see notes on the relevant sites). A second garbled list ('a prox mine a leion mine all Mali banshe fenri') naming several intel/trap gadgets near Living Room is also too corrupted to confidently map beyond that same Lesion identification and is flagged rather than resolved further.

reinforcements.note: Reinforce both walls of the double wall into Study.
Pair with feet holes along the rest of the wall instead of head holes.

headHoles.location: Aviators-Study Wall, Sightline Section
headHoles.note: Hold the Study door from here.

headHoles.location: Aviators-Study Wall, Sightline Section, Second Angle
headHoles.note: Hold the Study door from a second angle.

headHoles.location: Aviators-Study Wall, Sightline Section, Window Angle
headHoles.note: Covers the Study window — only spot on the map besides Top Main that sees the Study window from outside.

headHoles.location: Aviators-Study Wall, Feet Holes
headHoles.note: Run feet holes the length of the soft section. See attacker feet dropping from 90/Top Main from behind the bar before being seen. Aim head/chest height, not ankles.

headHoles.location: Feet Holes, Top Main Push
headHoles.note: Shoot attackers pushing Top Main from behind the bar before they reach the door.

rotates.note: Standard rotate for this side of the site.

hatches.note: Remove the hatch after placing the camera nearby so attackers can't knife it out through the hatch.
Place a Maestro cam in the corner first, then remove the hatch.

gadgetPlacements.note: Play behind the bar with C4 ready — usual plant spot is behind the Vault door.

gadgetPlacements.location: Edge of the window near 90, above the hatch
gadgetPlacements.note: Evil Eye camera on the edge of the window, not along the back wall of the hatch — attackers can walk along the back of the hatch and knife it there.

gadgetPlacements.location: Corner of Study, near the hatch
gadgetPlacements.note: Second Evil Eye camera, tucked in the corner before removing the Study hatch. Covers Study entry, Study-to-90, and Top Main/Top Red drone traffic.
Optional Observation Blocker right before the hatch so a drone can't immediately spot the Evil Eye cam. Also usable at the 90 hatch.

gadgetPlacements.location: Door, bathroom door, and stairs on the North side
gadgetPlacements.note: Gu mine traps on the door, bathroom door, and stairs; play around Master and Bathroom. Source audio rendered the name 'leion'/'legion' — resolved to Lesion (Gu mines are her gadget).

operatorRecommendations.note: Evil Eye cameras at 90 and Study for perimeter drone denial.
Gu mine traps on approach doors. Source audio rendered the name 'leion'/'legion'; resolved to Lesion.

generalTips.note: Dedicate at least one, ideally two defenders to the North side.
If pressured, fall back into Pig or Wolf (room with pig/wolf decoration, aka 'Wolf' — 'Wolf window' is this room's window) or back off toward Master/90.
Higher ELO lobbies tend to push from the North side; lower ELO lobbies tend to push from the Study/Balcony side.
Creator ranks Statue/Trophy above this site despite it being more popular.

reinforcements.note: Leave the left side of Statue soft.
Only four reinforcements used at this site.
Reinforce so you can peek the Study door from two spots. Play here briefly, kill a few drones, then disengage.

headHoles.location: Statue Walls, Right Side, Bottom-Right Angle
headHoles.note: Hold the bottom of Red Stairs.

headHoles.location: Statue Walls, Right Side, Second Angle
headHoles.note: Hold anyone coming out of Memo through the Dining door.

headHoles.location: Wall into Astro, Left Side
headHoles.note: Line of sight into Astro, paired with the rotate.

headHoles.location: Wall toward Closet
headHoles.note: Covers the Closet window.

headHoles.location: Wall toward Closet, Second Angle
headHoles.note: Covers the Master window from an extra spot.

headHoles.location: Feet holes near the Closet/Study window angle
headHoles.note: Hold the angle onto the window/Study, or stand back to catch feet as attackers jump in.

headHoles.location: Feet Holes, Closet/Study Window Angle, Extended
headHoles.note: Angle onto the Master window too. Watch for the drone hole here — ankles exposed if you stand too long.

headHoles.location: Back of Astro
headHoles.note: Line of sight toward Kitchen door and through to Bikes/Bike Storage/Mud Room.

headHoles.location: Behind the flight case, corner of Astro (bottom of Astro stairs)
headHoles.note: Attackers rarely check this corner.

headHoles.location: Bottom-right punch hole on the barricade reinforcement facing Trophy door
headHoles.note: Attackers fixate on the large barricade hole and miss this small punch hole.

headHoles.location: Classic line of sight over onto Balcony
headHoles.note: Covers Master Balcony.

gadgetPlacements.location: Behind the hard-breach wall near Bathroom
gadgetPlacements.note: 'Cheeky camera' to watch for hard breaches (Ace, Nomad/Thermite-style charges). Pull the Evil Eye back off the wall once breaching starts.

operatorRecommendations.note: Evil Eye cameras, plus a 'cheeky' camera watching the hard-breach spot near Bathroom.

generalTips.note: Master Balcony is the main threat here rather than Study, and it's a harder push than Study.

reinforcements.note: Same reinforcement as the Statue/Trophy setup.
Same as the Statue/Trophy site's setup.

reinforcements.location: Downstairs — Dining/Memo Door Walls (left and right)
Downstairs — Dining into Mudroom/Laundry, Right Side
Small wall leading down to the basement stairs
reinforcements.note: If left soft, attackers can hard-breach up from the basement stairs into a sightline reaching the back of Kitchen.

headHoles.location: Upstairs — Wall toward Closet (same as Statue/Trophy)
headHoles.note: Covers the Study window and Master window.

headHoles.location: Upstairs — Statue Walls, Right Side, Bottom-Right Angle
headHoles.note: Bottom of Red Stairs, reused from Statue/Trophy.

headHoles.location: Upstairs line of sight toward Memo
headHoles.note: If attackers control Top Four, they can hold this angle back on you — don't walk through this door if Top Four is lost.

headHoles.location: Feet holes along the wall near Dining/laundry
headHoles.note: Takes noticeably longer to make with Mute's shotgun than other breaching tools.

headHoles.location: Line of sight over the top of Pantry
headHoles.note: Drop C4 onto the Pantry stairs on sound cues, or punish the vault-window sound cue with C4.

headHoles.location: Feet holes near the rotate toward Memo
headHoles.note: See into Bike Storage from further back.

headHoles.location: Feet holes near laundry/Tetris
headHoles.note: Without these, attackers take this area for free via the one remaining door. Stand and hold without exposing feet once made.

rotates.location: Rotate on either side of the middle Dining/laundry wall
rotates.note: Either side works; no major difference.

rotates.location: Rotate near the wall to Memo
rotates.note: Reach Memo without the door, dodging the line of sight above it; flank around the corner if someone holds that door.
Rotate through the painting. Late-round retake option — make with an impact grenade rather than upfront.

hatches.note: Take out just the corner instead of the whole hatch — cheap line of sight to hold the door below. Also punishes Pantry window pushes from downstairs.

gadgetPlacements.note: C4 holes here and nearby to punish attackers holding laundry.
Second Mag-NET disc. Play Pantry early — shoot hard-breach charges (Ace/Thermite) off the wall before the window opens. Pass through the door here without being seen through the Pantry window.

gadgetPlacements.location: Wall by Pantry, not currently reinforced by the creator
gadgetPlacements.note: Reinforce this wall if you have a spare charge and plan to play around Pantry.

operatorRecommendations.note: Mag-NET discs around Laundry and Pantry/Pantry window.
Shotgun reinforcement animation takes noticeably longer than other operators' — factor into setup time.

generalTips.note: Hold upstairs — the entire ceiling above Dining/Kitchen is soft.
Take drones with you when contesting Top Four upstairs (expect Fuze, Ram, Sledge-style pushes).
Room naming correction: the room near Dining is 'Bike Storage'; the room called 'bikes' in the Aviator/Games section was actually Mud Room.
Use the laundry/Tetris feet holes instead of reinforcing both walls there.

sites.floor: Ground Floor (with soft ceiling from Games/Aviator above)

reinforcements.location: Two walls at the top end of Library, out toward Art
Left side wall of the Gallery, out into Red Corridor
Two single walls at the bottom of Living Room, toward the clock area/bottom Astro

headHoles.location: Bathroom Window, Head Hole
headHoles.note: Common attacker jump-in spot — cover it. Avoids pathing through a door that becomes a liability if attackers plant nearby.

rotates.note: Small hole to peek out and hold the corridor. Escape route into Red Stairs, toward Piano/Art, or around toward Main to flank.
Avoid the main door as your only path through if attackers plant at the bottom and camp it. Gives attackers some sightline into the site in return.

hatches.note: Drops into the basement — extra way out via the basement stairs.

gadgetPlacements.note: Trap/intel gadgets to cover the Mud Room window. Low Clash shield also works as a peek shield over the window. Source audio garbled as 'a prox mine a leion mine all Mali banshe fenri' — decoded as Kapkan proximity mine, Lesion Gu mine, Melusi Banshee, Fenrir dread mine; treat as best-effort reconstruction, not a literal quote.

generalTips.note: Weakest site on the map — play it last if you have a choice (after Statue/Trophy, Dining/Kitchen, Aviator/Games).
Watch for a Castle extension on both key doors rotating through to Piano.
Early plant spot behind the wall tucked into the fireplace if unreinforced — smoke or sensor-deny it.
The floor above (Games/Aviator) is soft — defender presence needed upstairs here too.
Attacker approach patterns to this site are less predictable than the other three.
